visual_description: A man in a white shirt and black tie stands in an office, looking at a television screen displaying black-and-white security footage of a person in an elevator. The man appears to be speaking to someone off-screen. The scene then cuts to two men sitting at a desk; one is in a police uniform and looks surprised, while the other, in a light-colored shirt, looks down with a serious expression.
audio_description: A man speaks in a serious and accusatory tone, questioning someone's attitude. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
